contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Warm-up draft batch-preview HTML — tiered review scanner
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/106
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/91
  
  Details:
  Built scripts/preview_warmup_drafts.py in market_research to replace uniform 'open every Gmail draft, skim, send' with a risk-tiered batch scan. Reads Email Agent Drafts rows (status=pending_review, gmail_label=AI/Warm-up), fetches full subject/body from each Gmail draft via API, cross-references Hit List for Hosts Circles=Yes / City+State / Notes, looks up DApp Remarks for prior CRM history, runs a 12-rule linter, renders a single static HTML page sorted red-flagged first.
  
  Lint taxonomy: red flags = subject empty / body empty / fallback 'your shop' / generic inbox (info@, sales@, contact@, etc.) / no first-name salutation / foreign-script venue / unrendered template placeholder / body < 200 chars. Yellow = no city/state / no Hit List Notes / no DApp Remarks history (cold first touch). Blue = Hosts Circles=Yes (high-leverage prospect badge for prioritization, not flagging).
  
  On today's 77-draft live sample: 49 red (35 generic-inbox + 31 fallback-shop-name overlap), 12 Hosts Circles=Yes badges, 28 clean. The 28 clean are now the 'glance + send' cohort; the 49 reds are the ones that warrant opening. Hosts Circles surfacing is itself a new value-add — those 12 high-leverage prospects had no review-time visibility before.
  
  Output written to scripts/output/warmup_batch_preview/ (gitignored). Auto-opens in browser. Send action stays manual in Gmail. Pairs with agentic_ai_context PR #91 (warm-up A/B read-out scheduled for 2026-05-11) — if reply rate stays healthy and no bad-copy pattern in reviewed sample, that's the signal to drop to fully auto-send for the unflagged tier.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
